# Crystal Almanac

> A science-first encyclopedia of 300 crystals, minerals, stones, and rocks. Every profile includes chemical formula, crystal system, Mohs hardness, formation geology, identification tips, fake-spotting guidance, and cultural traditions.

## Site Structure

- Homepage: https://crystalalmanac.com
- Crystal Profiles (300): https://crystalalmanac.com/crystals/{id}
- Blog (31 posts): https://crystalalmanac.com/blog/{slug}
- Collections (8): https://crystalalmanac.com/collections/{slug}
- Color Families (8): https://crystalalmanac.com/colors/{slug}
- Mineral Groups: https://crystalalmanac.com/groups
- Mohs Hardness Scale: https://crystalalmanac.com/hardness
- Birthstones: https://crystalalmanac.com/birthstones
- Crystal Care & Safety: https://crystalalmanac.com/care
- How to Spot Fakes: https://crystalalmanac.com/fakes
- Water Safety Guide: https://crystalalmanac.com/water-safe
- Crystal Identification: https://crystalalmanac.com/identify
- Beginners Guide: https://crystalalmanac.com/beginners

## What Each Crystal Profile Contains

Every crystal profile includes: name, subtitle, mineral category, colors with hex codes, Mohs hardness, chemical formula (Unicode subscripts), crystal system, luster, streak, transparency, specific gravity, 3-5 localities with geological notes, 2-3 paragraph formation geology, hand-specimen identification guide, practical fake-spotting instructions, metaphysical traditions (presented as cultural history, not claims), 3 related minerals, three-tier price range, and SEO description.

## Data Model

Crystal profiles are structured data with these fields: id, name, subtitle, category, colors, colorHexes, hardness, chemicalFormula, crystalSystem, luster, streak, transparency, specificGravity, localities, formation, identification, howToSpotFakes, metaphysical (chakra, zodiac, element, traditions), relatedMinerals, priceRange.

## Editorial Approach

Crystal Almanac leads with geological science: formation conditions, chemical processes, identification techniques, and fake-spotting. Metaphysical and healing traditions are documented as cultural history, not endorsed as medical or therapeutic claims. Content is written by E.M. Larkspur, M.S. Geological Sciences.

## Key Reference Pages

- Mohs Hardness Scale: Complete 1-10 scale with 300+ minerals mapped to hardness values
- Crystal Care: Water safety (never/brief/safe), sun sensitivity, toxic minerals (lead, arsenic, mercury, asbestos)
- Birthstones: Month-by-month traditional and modern birthstones
- Mineral Groups: 22 mineral group families with member crystals

## Sitemap

https://crystalalmanac.com/sitemap.xml
